ead.archdesc:
======= RMA02864Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records23-23-2864Compiled by College of Human Ecology StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

humecThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:26:46 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Department of Consumer Economics and Housing
23-23-2864
3.5 cubic feet. 3.5 cubic feet.
1969-1997. Reading lists, annual reports, list of theses, department meeting minutes, master plan, photographs, and Five Year Review and correspondence Reading lists, annual reports, list of theses from 1926-1990, department meeting minutes, master plan, and Five Year Review and correspondence. Collection material in English 2840158
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
College of Human Ecology Staff
Date completed:
March 2003
EAD encoding:
Justine C. Rosa, March 2003
Last modified:
RMC Staff, October 2013
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Reading lists, annual reports, list of theses from 1926-1990, department meeting minutes, master plan, and Five Year Review and correspondence.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Correspondence Box 2- Folder 55, Box 5- Folders 3-4, 6, 11-12
Series II. Curriculum
A. Course Outlines/ Reading ListsBox 1- Folders 18-45, Box 2- Folders 46-54
B. Intro Economics CourseBox 5- Folders 9-10
C. ThesesBox 2- Folder 62, Box 6
Series III. Handbooks
A. DepartmentBox 4
B. GraduateBox 5- Folder 17
Series IV. Minutes of Meetings
A. "The Committee" & Executive CommitteeBox 5- Folder 5
B. Curriculum CommitteeBox 5- Folders 7-8
C. Faculty MeetingsBox 1- Folders 10-17, Box 5- Folders 13-16
Series V. Publications Box 5- Folder 18-19, Box7- Folders 1-5
Series VI. Reports/ Plans
A. AnnualBox 1- Folder 7-9, Box 3, Box 5- Folder 1-2
B. Five Year PlansBox 1- Folder 2
C. Master PlansBox 1- Folder 3
D. ReviewsBox 1, Folder 48, Box 4
E. Chair's Reports to the DeanBox 1, Folder 46
F. Various other ReportsBox 1, Folder 49
Series VII. Subject Files Box 1- Folders 1, 4-6, 47, 50 Box 2- Folders 56-61
Series VIII. Photographs Box 7- Folder 7
Cite As:
Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records, #23-23-2864. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Biographical / Historical
From its founding to ca. 1969 the department was called Household Economics and Management. From ca. 1969 to ca. 1977 it was known as the Department of Consumer Economics and Public Policy. After 1977 it changed to the Department of Consumer Economics and Housing and in 1998 it merged with the Department of Human Service Studies to become the Department of Policy Analysis and Management.
Related Materials
See also New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Human Service Studies records, #23-24-2894
See also New York State College of Human Ecology Department of Policy Analysis and Management records, #23-26-3006
